creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #25)

Well, I would like to, but I'm not sure what the correct invocation for meson is to build it. It falls over finding intl.h and once that is solved it fails in linking because it expects environ to be defined. After fixing that, it fails asking for inotify_intl. 

I guess I would need configure line (unless a pulseaudio-devel port exists).
